title: Unspoken Sermons
author: George MacDonald
tradition_notes: MacDonald was ordained Congregationalist but his theology was broadly evangelical and influenced by German Romanticism. His sermons emphasize the Fatherhood of God and universal themes over denominational distinctives.
source_edition: Standard Ebooks edition (CC0 editorial work, public domain text)
notes: Three series (1867, 1885, 1889), 12 sermons each. series-N.xhtml files are container headings; chapter-N-M.xhtml files contain individual sermons with epigraph scripture references.
